citation: DeMiguel, Garlappi, Uppal, Optimal Versus Naive Diversification
design_implication: Equal weight remains a mandatory benchmark; improvements must be OOS and net of turnover.

citation: Bailey and Lopez de Prado, The Deflated Sharpe Ratio
design_implication: Track all trials; adjust raw Sharpe claims for selection bias and non-normality.

citation: Bailey, Borwein, Lopez de Prado, Zhu, Probability of Backtest Overfitting
design_implication: Use trial matrix/CSCV or at least report overfitting risk for winner selection.

citation: White, A Reality Check for Data Snooping
design_implication: Treat best-of-many strategies as exploratory unless corrected.

citation: Novy-Marx and Velikov, A Taxonomy of Anomalies and Their Trading Costs
design_implication: Report gross/net, turnover, and cost sensitivity for high-turnover screens.

citation: Frazzini, Israel, Moskowitz, Trading Costs of Asset Pricing Anomalies
design_implication: Capacity/cost modeling should be implementation-aware, not ignored.

citation: Elton, Gruber, Blake, Survivorship Bias and Mutual Fund Performance
design_implication: Current-constituent universes must be flagged unless point-in-time membership is used.

citation: Gu, Kelly, Xiu, Empirical Asset Pricing via Machine Learning
design_implication: Use large cross-sectional panels and OOS evaluation; momentum/liquidity/volatility are core predictors.

citation: Zhu et al., Online Portfolio Selection with Cardinality Constraint and Transaction Costs based on Contextual Bandit
design_implication: Model controller or asset-subset choice as arms with transaction-cost-aware rewards.

citation: Li et al., A Contextual-Bandit Approach to Personalized News Article Recommendation
design_implication: Start transparent contextual routing with LinUCB/LinTS before high-capacity gates.

citation: Shen et al., Meta-Learning the Optimal Mixture of Strategies for Online Portfolio Selection
design_implication: Route over policy families via soft mixture weights rather than always predicting one winner.
Treat momentum horizons/assets as separate experts; evaluate multi-gate mixture behavior.

citation: Shu, Yu, Mulvey, Dynamic Asset Allocation with Asset-Specific Regime Forecasts
design_implication: Add asset/factor-specific regime probabilities rather than only global descriptors.

citation: Du, Guo, Wang, High Dimensional Portfolio Selection with Cardinality Constraints
design_implication: Make holdings budget K an explicit control variable.

citation: Uematsu and Tanaka, Post-Screening Portfolio Selection
design_implication: Separate screening from low-dimensional weighting; defactor before screening when needed.

citation: Huang et al., Enhancing Portfolio Optimization
design_implication: Compare screen-then-weight pipelines against optimization without preselection.
